data.name: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.
data.value: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.
data.value: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.
data.value: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.

data.name: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.
data.value: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.

data.name: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).
data.value: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).

data.name: Which event type records your mood?
data.value: Which event type records your mood?

data.name: Which numeric field stores the mood score (e.g. 1–10)?
data.value: Which numeric field stores the mood score (e.g. 1–10)?
